company.name: Ionis Pharmaceuticals
company.subtitle: TRYNGOLZA $108M Y1 · Olezarsen sHTG PDUFA Apr 2026 · Donidalorsen launched · RNA platform leader
company.cashRunway: Cash flow breakeven target 2028 (~$2.4B cash + growing revenue)

market.notes: TRYNGOLZA FCS: $108M 2025 revenue (first year). sHTG sNDA PDUFA Apr 3, 2026 — peak sales guided >$2B. Phase 3 CORE/CORE2: 72% TG reduction, 85% reduction in acute pancreatitis. sHTG = ~2M US patients vs ~3K FCS. This is the blockbuster catalyst.
First RNA-targeted HAE prophylaxis. $7M Q4 2025 (first full quarter). Early launch momentum — all patient segments. EU launched Jan 2026. Competitors: Takhzyro (lanadelumab), Orladeyo (berotralstat).
Ultra-rare fatal neurological disease. First disease-modifying therapy. Pivotal data positive — NDA Q1 2026. Small revenue but high-margin orphan. First independent neuro launch for Ionis.

$212M total WAINUA sales 2025 → $49M royalty to Ionis. CARDIO-TTRansform ATTR-CM Phase 3 readout H2 2026 — massive TAM expansion. Partnered with AstraZeneca ($3.6B deal). If ATTR-CM positive: $5B+ peak sales potential.

assets.name: Bepirovirsen — chronic Hep B (partnered w/ GSK)

market.notes: B-Well 1+2 Phase 3 positive — first functional cure for CHB. Partnered with GSK. ~300M people with CHB globally. If approved: milestone + royalty stream.

HORIZON Phase 3 CVOT readout mid-2026. Partnered with Novartis. >20% of population has elevated Lp(a). If positive: first Lp(a)-lowering therapy with outcomes data. Multi-billion peak sales for Novartis → milestones + royalties to Ionis.

mega_bear.narrative: Olezarsen sHTG rejected + ATTR-CM fails + Lp(a) misses CVOT
events: ✗ FDA rejects olezarsen sHTG — safety concern or insufficient data
✗ CARDIO-TTRansform ATTR-CM misses — AstraZeneca deal devalued
✗ HORIZON Lp(a) CVOT misses — Novartis partnership gutted
→ Revenue growth stalls, cash burn accelerates, stock to $15-20

bear.narrative: Olezarsen sHTG approved but slow uptake + partner readouts mixed
events: ✓ Olezarsen sHTG approved but payer pushback on pricing
~ ATTR-CM marginal — benefit real but modest vs Alnylam
✗ Lp(a) HORIZON borderline — no clear CV outcome benefit
→ Revenue grows but path to breakeven pushes to 2029+

base.narrative: Olezarsen sHTG blockbuster launch + ATTR-CM positive + Lp(a) shows signal
events: ✓ Olezarsen sHTG approved Apr 2026 — rapid uptake, >$2B peak guided
✓ CARDIO-TTRansform positive — ATTR-CM label for eplontersen
~ HORIZON Lp(a) shows trend but formal CVOT benefit borderline
✓ Bepirovirsen CHB filed by GSK — milestones flowing

bull.narrative: Multi-blockbuster RNA platform — TG + ATTR-CM + Lp(a) all hit
events: ✓ Olezarsen becomes $3B+ franchise (sHTG + broader TG)
✓ ATTR-CM blockbuster — eplontersen $5B+ for AstraZeneca
✓ Lp(a) HORIZON positive — Novartis $10B+ franchise
✓ Platform generates $1B+ in royalties by 2028

psychedelic_bull.narrative: RNA therapeutics leader — Ionis becomes the Genentech of antisense — AZ/Novartis acquires
events: ✓ TG + ATTR-CM + Lp(a) + CHB — four blockbuster franchises simultaneously
✓ ION775 (siRNA) extends platform into next-gen modalities
✓ Neurology pipeline (Angelman, SMA, Huntington's) generates 3+ more drugs
✓ AstraZeneca or Novartis acquires entire platform at $100+/share

lastData.title: TRYNGOLZA $108M Y1 + olezarsen sHTG peak guided >$2B
points: Olezarsen sHTG: sNDA submitted, PDUFA Apr 3, 2026
DAWNZERA (donidalorsen HAE): $7M Q4, first full quarter, EU approved
WAINUA (eplontersen): $212M total 2025 sales → $49M royalty to Ionis
Bepirovirsen CHB: B-Well 1+2 Phase 3 positive — first functional cure
Zilganersen Alexander disease: NDA submitted Q1 2026

nextCatalyst.title: Olezarsen sHTG PDUFA — biggest near-term catalyst
thresholds: sHTG = ~2M US patients (vs 3K FCS) — 600x TAM expansion
72% TG reduction + 85% reduction in acute pancreatitis in Phase 3
Also mid-2026: HORIZON Lp(a) CVOT readout (Novartis)

risks: Olezarsen sHTG pricing/reimbursement risk — payer pushback in large population
HORIZON Lp(a) CVOT is high-risk — Lp(a) lowering may not translate to CV outcomes
ATTR-CM competitive with Alnylam's vutrisiran (HELIOS-B positive)
Cash burn ~$500M/yr — breakeven 2028 target depends on sHTG launch success
Complex business model — mix of own products, co-commercialization, royalties
RNA therapeutics face delivery challenges in some tissues
Ionis has historically overpromised on pipeline timelines
Stock underperformed peers despite strong pipeline — market skepticism on execution
